# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: app-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

- name: db-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - value: 0.0.0.0/0
          name: all
      dataDiskSizeGb: 10
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD

- name: db-root-password
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.db-instance.name)
    name: root
    password: ChangeThisPassword123!

- name: app-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.db-instance.name)
    name: appdb
    charset: utf8mb4

- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: n1-standard-1
      disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        type: PERSISTENT
        boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-11
          diskSizeGb: 10
      networkInterfaces:
      - network: global/networks/default
        accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
            #!/bin/bash
            apt-get update
            apt-get install -y nginx
            systemctl enable nginx
            systemctl start nginx
            echo "App Server Running" > /var/www/html/index.html
      tags:
        items:
        - http-server
        - https-server

- name: app-instance-group
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    targetSize: 2
    baseInstanceName: app-vm
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: 80

- name: app-autoscaler
  type: compute.v1.autoscaler
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    target: $(ref.app-instance-group.selfLink)
    autoscalingPolicy:
      minNumReplicas: 2
      maxNumReplicas: 5
      cpuUtilization:
        utilizationTarget: 0.6
      coolDownPeriodSec: 60

- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: HTTP
    httpHealthCheck:
      port: 80
      requestPath: /
    checkIntervalSec: 10
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.app-instance-group.instanceGroup)
      balancingMode: UTILIZATION
      capacityScaler: 1.0
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    sessionAffinity: NONE

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)

- name: allow-http-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: global/networks/default
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '80'
    targetTags:
    - http-server

- name: allow-https-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: global/networks/default
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '443'
    targetTags:
    - https-server

- name: allow-health-check-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: global/networks/default
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '80'
    targetTags:
    - http-server

outputs:
- name: LoadBalancerIP
  value: $(ref.app-forwarding-rule.IPAddress)
- name: DatabaseIP
  value: $(ref.db-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
- name: BucketName
  value: $(ref.app-bucket.name)
- name: DatabaseConnectionName
  value: $(ref.db-instance.connectionName)
